fields.inspection_points:
"Check smooth up/down movement
Check unusual noise/vibration
Check motor mounting bolts
Check current draw if applicable"

Chair Base	Backrest & Headrest	"Check locking mechanism
Check range of motion
Inspect hinges and joints
Lubricate moving parts"

"Verify all functions respond correctly
Inspect cable condition
Check return spring operation"

"Verify operating pressure
Inspect filter condition
Drain moisture if installed
Check for air leakage"

"Inspect bottle condition
Check water flow rate
Inspect tubing for leaks/cracks
Perform waterline disinfection"

"Check air function
Check water function
Check spray pattern
Inspect O-rings and leaks"

"Check speed control
Check forward/reverse function
Inspect electrical connection
Check overheating"

"Inspect tubing damage
Check coupling integrity
Check air/water delivery
Inspect for leakage"

"Check illumination intensity
Check focus pattern
Inspect handles
Verify positioning arm movement"

"Check suction performance
Inspect hoses
Clean traps and filters
Check for blockage"

"Check bowl rinse function
Check cup filler operation
Inspect drain line
Check sensors if fitted"

"Inspect power cord
Check grounding
Inspect fuses
Verify voltage output"

"Test emergency stop function
Verify reset operation
Inspect switch condition"
